    Serialized Form

    • Package kbtu.exceptions

      • Exception Class kbtu.exceptions.CreditLimitException

        class CreditLimitException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Exception Class kbtu.exceptions.LowHIndexException

        class LowHIndexException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Exception Class kbtu.exceptions.MaxFailsException

        class MaxFailsException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Exception Class kbtu.exceptions.NotResearcherException

        class NotResearcherException extends Exception implements Serializable

    • Package kbtu.model.course

      • Class kbtu.model.course.Course

        class Course extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • courseCode
            String courseCode
          • courseName
            String courseName
          • credits
            int credits
          • instructors
            List<Teacher> instructors
            List of teachers authorized to conduct the course.
          • lessons
            List<Lesson> lessons
            List of academic lessons (lectures, practices) associated with the course.
          • major
            String major
            The major or specialty this course is primarily intended for.
          • students
            List<Student> students
            List of students currently enrolled in the course.
          • targetYear
            int targetYear
            The recommended year of study for students taking this course.

      • Class kbtu.model.course.Enrollment

        class Enrollment extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • course
            Course course
          • status
            EnrollmentStatus status
          • student
            Student student

      • Class kbtu.model.course.Lesson

        class Lesson extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • room
            String room
            The physical room or laboratory where the lesson takes place.
          • topic
            String topic
            The specific subject or theme covered during the session.
          • type
            LessonType type
            The format of the lesson, such as LECTURE or PRACTICE.

      • Class kbtu.model.course.Mark

        class Mark extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • course
            Course course
          • finalExam
            double finalExam
          • firstAttestation
            double firstAttestation
          • secondAttestation
            double secondAttestation
          • student
            Student student

      • Class kbtu.model.course.Transcript

        class Transcript extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • marks
            List<Mark> marks
          • student
            Student student

    • Package kbtu.model.notification

      • Class kbtu.model.notification.News

        class News extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • comments
            List<String> comments
            Collection of user-submitted strings for the news post.
          • content
            String content
          • date
            Date date
          • isPinned
            boolean isPinned
            Indicates if the news item is stuck to the top of the list.
          • isResearchRelated
            boolean isResearchRelated
            Flag to distinguish between academic research news and general updates.
          • title
            String title

      • Class kbtu.model.notification.Request

        class Request extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • description
            String description
          • id
            String id
          • sender
            User sender
          • signedBy
            User signedBy
          • status
            RequestStatus status
          • timestamp
            Date timestamp

    • Package kbtu.model.research

      • Class kbtu.model.research.Journal

        class Journal extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialization Methods

          • readObject
            private void readObject(ObjectInputStream in) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
            Throws:
            IOException
            ClassNotFoundException

        • Serialized Fields

          • name
            String name
          • papers
            List<ResearchPaper> papers

      • Class kbtu.model.research.ResearchPaper

        class ResearchPaper extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • authors
            List<String> authors
          • citations
            int citations
            Number of times this work has been cited by other researchers.
          • datePublished
            Date datePublished
          • doi
            String doi
            Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for unique identification of the paper.
          • journal
            Journal journal
            The scientific journal where the paper was published.
          • pages
            int pages
          • title
            String title

      • Class kbtu.model.research.ResearchProject

        class ResearchProject extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • participants
            List<Researcher> participants
            Collection of university members (Researchers) contributing to the project.
          • publishedPapers
            List<ResearchPaper> publishedPapers
            List of research papers published as a direct result of this project.
          • topic
            String topic
            The main subject or field of study for this project.

    • Package kbtu.model.user

      • Class kbtu.model.user.Admin

        class Admin extends Employee implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • logFiles
            List<String> logFiles
            Stores log entries of administrative actions with timestamps.

      • Class kbtu.model.user.Student

        class Student extends User implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • failedCount
            int failedCount
          • gpa
            double gpa
          • major
            String major
          • marks
            Map<String,Mark> marks
            Map storing marks where the key is the course code.
          • minor
            String minor
          • organizations
            List<String> organizations
            List of organizations the student is a member of.
          • totalCredits
            int totalCredits
          • yearOfStudy
            int yearOfStudy

      • Class kbtu.model.user.Teacher

        class Teacher extends Employee implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • courseCodes
            List<String> courseCodes
            List of unique course codes assigned to the teacher.
          • portfolio
            List<ResearchPaper> portfolio
            List of research papers published by the teacher.
          • position
            TeacherPosition position
            Current academic rank/position of the teacher.

      • Class kbtu.model.user.User

        class User extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

          • email
            String email
          • fullName
            String fullName
          • id
            String id
          • notifications
            List<String> notifications
          • password
            String password
          • username
            String username
